text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Step right up! Get your iced hot water here!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bubbling hot water, cooled with only 
the iciest of ice…

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Room temperature? More like right 
temperature! Not too cold, but not too hot! 
Get 'em while they're lukewarm!
